habitat: Wet banks and ditches of Europe.
habitatDe: Wet banks und ditches von Europa.
traditionalUsesEn: Historical fever and liver folk herb; modern internal use discouraged (PA).
traditionalUsesDe: Historisch fever und Leber folk Kraut; modern innerlich Verwendung discouraged (PA).
preparation: Primarily historical interest; avoid DIY internal use.
preparationDe: Primarily historisch interest; meiden DIY innerlich Verwendung.
cautions: Pyrrolizidine alkaloids — do not use internally as crude herb.
cautionsDe: Pyrrolizidine Alkaloide — nicht Verwendung internally als crude Kraut.
historicalNotes: Pink riverside plumes of European wetlands.
historicalNotesDe: Pink ufernah plumes von europäisch wetlands.
